query:
INSERT INTO approver_config (approverRole, name, email)
VALUES 
  ('danny', 'Danny', 'danny@absolute-aromas.com'),
  ('david', 'David', 'david@absolute-aromas.com')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  name = VALUES(name),
  email = VALUES(email);
